tables.description: Customer order records including status and lifecycle timestamps.

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Identifier of the customer who placed the order

columns.name: status
columns.description: Order status: Complete, Shipped, Processing, Cancelled, Returned

columns.name: returned_at
columns.description: When the order was returned, if applicable

columns.name: num_of_item
columns.description: Number of items in the order

tables.description: Line items within each order, including sale price and fulfillment status.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the order item

columns.name: inventory_item_id
columns.description: Identifier of the specific inventory unit sold

columns.name: status
columns.description: Fulfillment status of this line item

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: When the line item was created

columns.name: shipped_at
columns.description: When the line item was shipped

columns.name: delivered_at
columns.description: When the line item was delivered

columns.name: returned_at
columns.description: When the line item was returned

columns.name: sale_price
columns.description: Price the item was sold for - used for revenue calculations

tables.description: Product catalog with pricing, category, and brand information.

columns.name: category
columns.description: Product category, e.g. Jeans, Tops & Tees

columns.name: distribution_center_id
columns.description: Identifier of the distribution center stocking this product

tables.description: Customer records including demographics and location.

columns.name: traffic_source
columns.description: Marketing channel that acquired the customer

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: When the customer account was created

tables.description: Individual inventory units tracked from purchase to sale, including cost basis.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the inventory item

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: When the inventory item was created

columns.name: sold_at
columns.description: When the inventory item was sold

columns.name: cost
columns.description: Cost basis of the inventory item

columns.name: product_retail_price
columns.description: Retail price of the related product

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for the distribution center

tables.description: Website clickstream events for each user session.

columns.name: user_id
columns.description: Identifier of the user, if logged in

columns.name: sequence_number
columns.description: Order of the event within the session

columns.name: event_type
columns.description: Type of event: home, product, cart, purchase, etc.
